title: Chassis event instance (CloudEvents-aligned)
description: Schema for an actual event message flowing through the system. Aligns with CloudEvents v1.0 required attributes (specversion, id, type, source) plus Chassis extensions (aggregateId, version, metadata). This is the message shape; event.schema.json is the type contract.

type.description: Event type identifier matching an event contract's eventId

source.description: Origin of the event (service URI or module ID)

subject.description: Subject of the event in context of source (e.g., resource ID)

data.description: Event payload. Shape defined by the event type contract.

aggregateId.description: Domain aggregate this event belongs to (for event sourcing)

causationId.description: ID of the event that caused this one

userId.description: Who or what triggered this event
